notes:
## 2.6.0

## What's new

- **Play Protect / installer** — Protect can scan Steady updates; confirm UI re-arms the allow window so install doesn’t bounce away.
- **Approved Play Store stays open** — timed-allow / allow-cache wins over the hard block list.
- **Day off** — apps stay colorful and open; gray-out clears; hard blocks rest during pause.
- **Home cleanup** — no streak line, no Focus “no daily clock” pill, no duplicate date; search icon next to Refresh; profiles open from ⋮ as a menu (not a home card).
- **Ask from parent** — wording no longer says “parent phone / website”; Pending asks supports Allow / Don’t allow for mode unlocks; publish retries + clearer status.
- **Focus** — all non-Never apps allowed; switching profiles on a kid phone still needs parent PIN / ask.
- **Kid settings** — Look, Home, and This phone sections with plain blurbs.
- **Share weekly summary** — share sheet allowed briefly so it doesn’t snap shut; app names in the report.
- **Dashboard** — compact Refresh / Sign out, cleaner kid rename, usage + tips in More, app labels instead of package codes.

_Install on the kid phone. Hard-refresh the dashboard after deploy._
